text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Woo! I am feeling great after getting that time off!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, I'm gonna pour all of my energy
back into watching Umas again! Weee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Agnes Digital got a good rest and
replenished her energy!
